# services.atuin

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.atuin`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.atuin.database.createLocally` | `boolean` | Create the database and database user locally. |
| `services.atuin.database.uri` | `null or string` | URI to the database. Can be set to null in which case ATUIN_DB_URI should be set through an EnvironmentFile |
| `services.atuin.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Atuin server for shell history sync. |
| `services.atuin.environmentFile` | `null or absolute path not in the Nix store` | Environment file, used to set any secret ATUIN\_\* environment variables, such as ATUIN_DB_URI containing a password. See https://docs.atuin.sh/cli/self-hosting/server-setup/#configuration for available environment variables. |
| `services.atuin.host` | `string` | The host address the atuin server should listen on. |
| `services.atuin.maxHistoryLength` | `signed integer` | The max length of each history item the atuin server should store. |
| `services.atuin.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Open ports in the firewall for the atuin server. |
| `services.atuin.openRegistration` | `boolean` | Allow new user registrations with the atuin server. |
| `services.atuin.package` | `package` | The atuin package to use. |
| `services.atuin.path` | `string` | A path to prepend to all the routes of the server. |
| `services.atuin.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port the atuin server should listen on. |
